vocab.meaning: những năm tháng hình thành tính cách (tuổi thơ)
vocab.example: During my formative years, I spent countless afternoons wandering through the local park with my grandfather.

vocab.meaning: sự tiếp cận không giới hạn/tự do
vocab.example: Growing up in the countryside meant I had unrestricted access to vast open fields for my daily strolls.

vocab.meaning: niềm đam mê khám phá/đi đây đi đó
vocab.example: Even as a toddler, I had a sense of wanderlust that would lead me to explore every nook and cranny of our neighborhood.
My parents rarely let me walk near the bustling thoroughfare alone due to the heavy traffic.
Going for a walk was the only way for a city kid like me to truly commune with nature.

vocab.meaning: vùng ngoại ô xanh mát (nhiều cây cối)
vocab.example: I was fortunate enough to be raised in a leafy suburb where every street was lined with ancient oak trees.
I often reminisce about those evening walks when the air was cool and the world seemed so much bigger.

vocab.meaning: tuổi thơ vô tư lự, không lo âu
vocab.example: Walking aimlessly without a watch was a hallmark of my carefree childhood.
We used to go for long walks hoping to stumble upon hidden streams or secret gardens in the woods.
Back then, a sedentary lifestyle was unheard of because we were always outdoors on our feet.
